quiz_items.question: A manufacturer has been producing laser products for 3 years. How long must they maintain distribution records?
quiz_items.explanation: Manufacturers must maintain records including written QC procedures, test results, life testing results, communications about radiation safety, and distribution records for tracing in event of recall - typically for 5 years.

quiz_items.question: What records must manufacturers maintain per 21 CFR 1002.30? (Select all that apply)
options: Written description of quality control procedures
Copies of communications concerning radiation safety
quiz_items.explanation: Required records include: written QC procedures, test results, life testing results, written communications about radiation safety (complaints, instructions), and product distribution records.
